links.targetTitle: DocumentToolbar exposes className enabledControls and callback props

title: PHDocument v4.0.0 consolidated all metadata into a header field with signature support and per-scope revision tracking
content: Powerhouse v4.0.0 introduced a breaking refactor of `PHDocument` structure. All metadata moved from root-level to `document.header`: `id`, `name`, `slug`, `documentType`, `branch`, `meta`. Key renames: `created` -> `createdAtUtcIso`, `lastModified` -> `lastModifiedAtUtcIso`. The `revision` field changed from a number to an object with scope keys: `{ global: 5, local: 0 }`. A new `sig` field was added with `nonce` and `publicKey` for cryptographic document verification. The `id` field now supports Ed25519 signatures for signed documents. The GraphQL API maintains backward compatibility through response transformation, but application code must use the new header structure.
description: Previously scattered root-level properties moved under document.header, revision became an object with scope keys, timestamps renamed.
